_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors.

_contextSnippet: GRDC24 displayed far less cytotoxicity in non-NF1 cells, such as ipn02.3λ, especially at lower multiplicity of infection (MOI) of 500 and 100
details: GRDC24 displayed far less cytotoxicity in non-NF1 cells, especially at lower MOI of 500 and 100
